response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive experience in senior software development roles, with leadership at top-tier companies like Google and Meta. His background in open-source projects, IT architecture, and team mentorship aligns well with the Head of Development role. While his German proficiency is listed as basic (contrary to the requirement), his strong technical leadership, strategic thinking, and communication skills make him a compelling candidate. The opportunity to assess his language fluency and leadership style in an interview is justified.
strengths: Extensive senior-level experience at Google and Meta, demonstrating high-level technical leadership and strategic problem-solving.
Strong background in open-source technologies and IT architecture, including contributions to Geo-Data platforms and AI-agent infrastructure.
Proven mentorship and team management experience, with a focus on software craftsmanship and modern development practices.
concerns: German language proficiency is listed as basic, which falls short of the required C1 level.
Limited direct experience with UML modeling, a desired qualification for the role.
Unclear depth of experience with IT security, risk management, and compliance considerations, though some exposure is implied.
